query: our Maximo Genie keeps giving wrong answers, fix it
expected_behavior: Does NOT immediately rewrite SQL; surfaces the clarifying questions first
Asks which modules/tables are in scope for this Space (a too-broad Space dilutes accuracy)
Asks whose definitions seed the instructions ('open', 'completed', 'corrective vs preventive', 'bad actor', 'PM compliance' each have multiple valid framings owned by the module skills)
Confirms maximo-setup has registered UC comments and the workspace glossary, since a Space built without them is the #1 cause of wrong answers
Then fixes in order: UC comment (via maximo-setup) -> glossary synonym/instruction -> example query or Trusted Asset
